TLDR AI

Headlines & Launches

Nvidia unveiled its next-gen B300 accelerator with 288GB of HBM4 memory, claiming 2.2x training throughput over the B200. Cloud providers say instances land in Q4. Nvidia announcement (4 minute read)

Research

A DeepMind paper shows sparse "mixture of depths" transformers cutting inference cost 40% with no quality loss on reasoning benchmarks. Paper summary (12 minute read)

Quick Links

GitHub Copilot adds team-wide custom instructions. Link
